command:
# Set Nel + Ra markers so they don't re-publish today (they already have 1 report each)
touch /tmp/nel-research-published-20260414
touch /tmp/nel-report-published-20260414
touch /tmp/ra-research-published-20260414
touch /tmp/ra-report-published-20260414

# REMOVE Aether's markers so the next cycle produces one legitimate daily report
rm -f /tmp/aether-published-20260414
rm -f /tmp/aether-report-published-20260414

echo 'Markers set. Nel/Ra gated for today. Aether unlocked for next cycle.'
ls -la /tmp/*published*20260414 2>/dev/null
stdout:
Markers set. Nel/Ra gated for today. Aether unlocked for next cycle.
-rw-r--r--  1 kai  wheel  0 Apr 14 18:31 /tmp/nel-report-published-20260414
-rw-r--r--  1 kai  wheel  0 Apr 14 18:31 /tmp/nel-research-published-20260414
-rw-r--r--  1 kai  wheel  0 Apr 14 18:31 /tmp/ra-report-published-20260414
-rw-r--r--  1 kai  wheel  0 Apr 14 18:31 /tmp/ra-research-published-20260414
